welcome.title: Open a Git repository to see your branch tree
welcome.subtitle: Click the folder icon in the top bar to get started

tree.empty: No commits yet in this repository.

detail.title: Commit Details
detail.author: Author
detail.noData: Select a commit to see details

init.confirm: This folder is not a Git repository. Initialize git here?

help.title: GBT Help
help.commitsClick: Click a dot — View commit details
help.commitsDouble: Double-click a dot — Checkout that commit
help.commitsHover: Hover a dot — Quick info tooltip
help.commitsRevert: Revert button — Undo a commit (hidden if already reverted)
help.branchesClick: Click a branch label — Switch to that branch
help.buttonsCommit: Commit — Stage files and create a new commit
help.buttonsRefresh: Refresh — Reload branch tree and file status
help.tipsInit: Opening a non-Git folder prompts you to git init
help.tipsLang: Use 中/EN to switch between Chinese and English
